'''yabofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hucking|hucking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hucking|hucking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yabofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæbefeth|yæbefeth]] || [[word:yæbefej|yæbefej]] || [[word:yæbefesh|yæbefesh]] || [[word:yæbefe|yæbefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yabobofoth|yabobofoth]] || [[word:yabobofoj|yabobofoj]] || [[word:yabobofosh|yabobofosh]] || [[word:yabobofo|yabobofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yabofoth|yabofoth]] || [[word:yabofoj|yabofoj]] || [[word:yabofosh|yabofosh]] || [[word:yabofo|yabofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yaboffofth|yaboffofth]] || [[word:yaboffofj|yaboffofj]] || [[word:yaboffofsh|yaboffofsh]] || [[word:yaboffof|yaboffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yabofotho|yabofotho]] || [[word:yabofojo|yabofojo]] || [[word:yabofosho|yabofosho]] || [[word:yabofoko|yabofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yabofoth|yabofoth]] || [[word:yabofoj|yabofoj]] || [[word:yabofosh|yabofosh]] || [[word:yabofo|yabofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yabofothol|yabofothol]] || [[word:yabofojol|yabofojol]] || [[word:yabofoshol|yabofoshol]] || [[word:yabofokol|yabofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yabofoothotho|yabofoothotho]] || [[word:yabofoojojo|yabofoojojo]] || [[word:yabofooshosho|yabofooshosho]] || [[word:yabofooko|yabofooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yabofothon|yabofothon]] || [[word:yabofojon|yabofojon]] || [[word:yabofoshon|yabofoshon]] || [[word:yabofokon|yabofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yabofothooro|yabofothooro]] || [[word:yabofojooro|yabofojooro]] || [[word:yabofoshooro|yabofoshooro]] || [[word:yabofokooro|yabofokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
